title: Report
description: A report, investigation, data brief, or agency report card published by the NYC Public Advocate. Today these are HTML pages and PDFs on the self-hosted advocate.nyc.gov site (which returned 502 during the crawl); there is no index API, no structured metadata, and no Open Data. Proposed schema for a machine-readable catalog of the office's investigative output.

reportId.description: Stable identifier / slug for the report.

topic.description: Subject area (housing, education, health, transparency, etc.).

agenciesReferenced.description: City agencies the report investigates or grades.
